overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a forest trail at dusk. The character traverses from a dense dark woodland into an open mountain vista with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance, then continues along the winding path through mixed forest terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest trail at dusk

events.description: distant mountain range becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the narrow forest path between dense trees

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
distant snow-capped mountains barely visible through the canopy
grey cloudy sky visible through tree gaps

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dense coniferous forest at dusk, with the character running along a narrow dirt trail. The trees create an enclosed feeling with limited sky visibility. Around the 10-second mark, the distant mountain range becomes visible ahead as the trail begins to open up.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook trail with valley views

events.description: ambient light increases as camera emerges from dense tree cover into open vista
forest valley and distant lake become visible to the right of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail with expansive mountain views opening to the right side

entered.detail: sweeping view of forested valley with misty lake visible below
scattered trees replacing the dense forest on the left

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up into a wide mountain vista with full sky visibility. The dense forest gives way to scattered trees as a sweeping valley view appears on the right. The snow-capped mountain range shifts to dominate the right side of the frame while the character continues running along the exposed path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with mixed coniferous and deciduous trees

events.description: path curves gently to the left as the character continues forward

agents.ego_description: running along the curving trail through mixed forest terrain with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: leafy broadleaf trees mixed with the coniferous forest
rocky hillside terrain visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left through mixed forest terrain featuring both coniferous and deciduous trees. The valley view disappears behind the character while the mountain range shifts from right to left in the frame. Rocky outcrops become visible on the left hillside as the path continues winding through the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense coniferous forest that gradually opens into a sweeping mountain vista before curving back into mixed woodland. It begins with the character running along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by towering trees that limit the view of the dusk sky. As the trail opens up, the dense forest gives way to scattered trees and a wide valley view, allowing a snow-capped mountain range to dominate the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts as the path curves left, causing the valley to disappear and the mountains to slide across the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail through a blend of coniferous and deciduous trees, passing rocky outcrops on the left hillside.
